title: Nutty Gooey Mediterranean Almond Stir-fry
description: A nutty and gooey crowd-pleaser mediterranean dish featuring rum-infused almonds in a bhuna sauce with a low-sodium twist, perfect for adding a festive touch to any meal.

ingredients.name: Nutritional yeast (optional for additional umami flavor)

instructions: Heat the rum-infused almonds in a small pan until they start to caramelize and add a bit of depth of flavor. Remove from heat.
In a large skillet, warm the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the onion and garlic, sautéing for about 2-3 minutes or until soft and translucent.
Stir in the red pepper flakes and tomato paste, cooking for an additional minute to soften the ingredients slightly.
Pour in the low-sodium chicken broth and low-sodium soy sauce, stir well to combine. Bring to a simmer then reduce heat to medium-low and let it cook until thickened, about 10 minutes.
Gently fold in the rum-infused almonds, stirring until fully coated with the sauce. If desired, sprinkle the nutritional yeast over the mixture for added umami flavor.
Add the olive oil to the skillet, then add the cooked stir-fry mix and gently toss to combine evenly. Toss in the fresh herbs and serve hot.
